idea-plugin.name: Task Manager
idea-plugin.description:
Task management plugin with Claude Code integration for tracking and executing project tasks directly from the IDE.

Features

  • Organize tasks into collapsible groups with automatic status tracking
  • Task statuses: New, In Progress, Completed, Paused, Cancelled
  • Each task links to a Markdown file with detailed description and instructions
  • Run tasks via Claude Code — opens a terminal with /task-execute skill
  • Create tasks from the UI or via /task-create Claude skill
  • Completed groups auto-collapse and fade, sinking to the bottom of the list
  • Pagination with configurable page size
  • Available as a side panel, bottom panel, or editor tab
  • Auto-archiving of completed groups to keep the task file compact

Storage

Tasks are stored per-project in .claude/tasks/tasks.json with Markdown docs in .claude/tasks/docs/. Completed groups are archived to archive.json automatically.

action.description: Open Task Manager in editor tab
